top_signals.title: Frank McCourt-backed Premier Jumping League raises £37m from first team sale
top_signals.summary: The Premier Jumping League has raised $50m (£38m) from the first sale of a team in the new showjumping competition backed by former LA Dodgers owner Frank McCourt. The team, which will be one of 16 in the PJL when it launches next year, has been bought by US investor and racing driver Jason McCarthy. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Bernstein says prediction-market infrastructure rush could spark wave of M&A across consumer platforms
top_signals.summary: Bernstein said DraftKings' DKeX launch keeps prediction-market revenue in-house as consolidation reshapes trading and betting platforms.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
